mapper.select: select count(0) from synlte.ENTITY_ELEMENT where upper(elemntcode) = upper(#{elementCode})

select elemntcode as elementCode,elemntchname as elementChname,iselemnt as isElement,sameid as sameId, elemntobject as elementObject,elemntrule as elementRule,createmode as createMode,author as author, moddate as modDate from synlte.ENTITY_ELEMENT where upper(elemntcode) = upper(#{elementCode})
mapper.update: update synlte.ENTITY_ELEMENT set ELEMNTCHNAME = #{elementChname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ELEMNTOBJECT=#{elementObject,jdbcType=VARCHAR},ELEMNTRULE=#{elementRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AUTHOR = #{author,jdbcType=VARCHAR},MODDATE = CURRENT_DATE where upper(ELEMNTCODE) = upper(#{elementCode})
mapper.select: select count(0) from synlte.ENTITY_ELEMENT where upper(ELEMNTCODE) = upper(#{elementCode})
select l.code_text as id ,count(e.elemntobject) as value from all_code_data l left join synlte.ENTITY_ELEMENT e on e.elemntobject = l.code_value where l.code_id='ELEMENTOBJECT' group by l.code_text

select fieldid as id,fieldchinesename as value,sameid as sameId from synlte.synltefield where FIELDID is not null and GADSJ_FIELDID is not null and upper(substr(FIELDID,0,3)) !='WBZ' AND STATUS = '05' and field_standard != '99'
and (upper(fieldid) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) or upper(fieldchinesename) like upper(concat(#{searchName},'%')) )

select distinct d.codetext as value ,s.codeid as id from synlte.synltefield s left join (select codeid,CODETEXT from synlte.fieldcode ) d on s.codeid = d.codeid where fieldid NOT like 'WB%' and s.codeid is not null and d.codetext is not null
and upper(d.codetext) like concat(#{searchName},'%')
select distinct valtext as value,valvalue as id from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid=#{codeId}
select count(distinct TABLEID) from synlte.object_enlement where elemntid = #{elementCode}
select code_text as value ,code_value as id from all_code_data where code_id='ELEMENTOBJECT'
select code_value from all_code_data where code_id='ELEMENTOBJECT' and code_text= #{elementObject}

select elemntchname from synlte.ENTITY_ELEMENT
elemntchname like concat('%',concat(#{searchName},'%'))
select sameId from synlte.synltefield where fieldid = #{fieldId}
select wordname from synlte.sameword where sameid = #{sameId}

select r.code_value as id, r.code_text as name, case when l.value is null then 0 else l.value end value from (select elemntobject as id, count(*) as value from (select distinct o.objectid, x.label, x.elemntobject from synlte.object o left join (select distinct objf.objectid, ee.fieldid, ee.label, ee.elemntobject from synlte.objectfield objf right join (select elemntobject, elemntcode as fieldid, elemntchname as label from synlte.ENTITY_ELEMENT where createmode = '1') ee on objf.fieldid = ee.fieldid) x on o.objectid = x.objectid) where label is not null group by elemntobject) l right join all_code_data r on l.id = r.code_value where r.code_id = 'ELEMENTOBJECT' order by r.code_value

select elemntcode as value, case when x.value is null then elemntchname || '(' || 0 || ')' else elemntchname || '(' || x.value || ')' end as label from (select * from synlte.entity_element where elemntobject = #{elementObject} and createmode = '1') ente left join (select label, count(*) as value from (select distinct o.objectid, x.label from synlte.object o left join (select distinct objf.objectid, ee.fieldid, ee.label from synlte.objectfield objf right join (select elemntcode as fieldid, elemntchname as label from synlte.ENTITY_ELEMENT where createmode = '1') ee on objf.fieldid = ee.fieldid) x on o.objectid = x.objectid and x.label is not null) where label is not null group by label) x on ente.elemntchname = x.label
select ELEMNTCHNAME from synlte.entity_element where createmode=1 and elemntcode=#{elementCode}
select ELEMNTCHNAME as elementChname, elemntcode as elementCode from synlte.entity_element where createmode=1
